message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 18:00 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from kings lynn and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 08:00 and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
